ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "value" REAL /* Market value of the player in millions */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the match took place */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "team_b_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "match_week" INTEGER /* Match week (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the player participated */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is being recorded */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player in the match */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets achieved by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player in the match */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target by the player in the match */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player in the match */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the player in the match */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player in the match */,
  "tackles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of tackles lost by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is leaving */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is joining */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the transfer in millions */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan, free agent) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
